title: rubus serpens var. deflexispinus
intro: Rubus serpens var. deflexispinus, also known as a thorny dewberry or a thorny blackberry, is a thorny shrub native to North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus serpens var. deflexispinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. This plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
